habit_desc: I pick at my skin when I feel anxious or bored.
challenges: I often do it without noticing until I have already started.
triggers: Stress, being alone, and watching TV.
past_interventions: Fidget tools helped briefly but I stopped using them.
motivation_stop: I want fewer visible marks and more control.
interest_in_product: I was interested in a tool that could interrupt the habit in the moment.
liked_features: The wearable helped me notice when I was doing it.
app_improve: The app should make it faster to log an urge.
other_comments: I would keep using it if it stayed simple.

habit_desc: I bite my nails mostly when I am working or thinking hard.
challenges: It feels automatic and hard to interrupt.
past_interventions: Bitter nail polish worked for a week and then I ignored it.
motivation_stop: I want to stop damaging my nails and cuticles.
interest_in_product: I wanted something more active than just tracking.
liked_features: I liked seeing progress over time.
app_improve: The dashboard was a little confusing at first.
other_comments: The data was interesting but I wanted clearer trends.

habit_desc: I pull my hair when I feel overwhelmed.
challenges: It gives temporary relief, so it is hard to stop.
past_interventions: I tried wearing hats and using reminders on my phone.
motivation_stop: I want to feel less controlled by stress habits.
interest_in_product: I was curious whether a wearable cue would work better than phone reminders.
liked_features: The product made me more aware of my urges.
app_improve: I wanted more supportive messages in the app.
other_comments: I would like the product to feel calmer and less clinical.

habit_desc: I scratch my scalp when I am tired or zoning out.
challenges: Sometimes I do not realize I am doing it.
triggers: Late at night, boredom, and scrolling on my phone.
past_interventions: I have tried keeping my hands busy with blankets or hair ties.
motivation_stop: I want to catch it sooner instead of after the fact.
interest_in_product: I was interested in something subtle that I could wear all day.
other_comments: The best part was not having to explain it to anyone.

habit_desc: I chew the inside of my cheek when I feel tense.
challenges: It happens quickly and feels hard to catch.
past_interventions: Deep breathing helps sometimes if I notice early enough.
motivation_stop: I want less jaw pain and fewer mouth sores.
interest_in_product: I wanted something discreet for work and public settings.
liked_features: The bracelet gave me a pause before continuing.
app_improve: I would like simpler navigation and a clearer main button.
other_comments: Anything that needs too much attention will not work in meetings.

habit_desc: I pick at my cuticles during busy transitions.
challenges: I usually notice only after I have been doing it for a while.
triggers: Walking between tasks, commuting, and stress.
past_interventions: I tried keeping lotion nearby, but it did not help when I was rushing.
motivation_stop: I want to stop because it makes my hands sore and distracting.
interest_in_product: I was interested in something fast enough to use while moving.
liked_features: I liked that the intervention felt immediate.
app_improve: It should be easier to use with one hand.
other_comments: I need it to work when my phone is already in my hand.

habit_desc: I pull at my eyelashes when I feel emotionally drained.
challenges: Once I start, I lose track of time.
triggers: End of day fatigue, conflict, and long periods alone.
past_interventions: I have tried journaling and timers.
motivation_stop: I want to stop before it becomes a long episode.
interest_in_product: I wanted a way to notice the behavior earlier.
liked_features: The tactile feedback helped me reset.
app_improve: I want the follow-up screen to feel less demanding.
other_comments: I would benefit from prompts that adapt to how stressed I am.

habit_desc: I scratch my arms when I am restless or understimulated.
challenges: It does not always feel urgent, but it becomes automatic.
triggers: Watching shows, reading, and downtime at home.
past_interventions: Bandages and self-talk helped a little.
motivation_stop: I want fewer skin injuries and less embarrassment.
interest_in_product: I was interested in tracking patterns, not just stopping in the moment.
liked_features: I liked having both a wearable and app option.
app_improve: Trend views should be clearer and easier to interpret.
other_comments: I care about the history view as much as the interruption feature.
